titleStmt.title: SII 7.244: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 244. (A.R. No. 68 of 1901). ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE NORTH WALL OF THE GURURAYA-BASTI AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāt trailō
kyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti śrī [*] jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhanaśakavarṣa 1514 neya vijayasaṁva
tsarada bhādrapada śuddha tadigeyū ravivāradalū baṁ
ḍi vuṁmaṇaseṭṭiya maga kellibaḷiya birmmaṇaseṭṭiyaru gu
rurāyarabastiya caṁdranāthasvāmiya saṁnidhiyalli
naḍava ṣōḍaśabhāvanege koṭṭa varahagadyāṇa 160 . Idakke ba
ḍḍi Akki 50 lekkada mūḍe 51 . yī Akkige naḍava dharmmada viva
ra . mūṟu maṁgaladalū caṁdranāthage Abhiṣēka pratyēkavā
gi 72 taṁḍa tīrtthakara pūje nityadalū paṁcāmṛtābhiṣēka
da ṣōḍaśabhāvaneya pūje yī lekkadalū 32 divasa
naḍasuvudu . Ī 51 mūḍe Akkiyalli caṁdranāthana Abhi
ṣeṁka 3 kke Akkimūḍe 6 Ā 3 maṁgalakke Akkimūḍe 12 mi
kka 29 dinada pūjege Akki mūḍe 29 paṁcaparamēṣṭigaḷige
Amṛtapaḍige Akkimūḍe 2 nitya hāladhārege Akkimūḍe 2
Aṁtu Akki mūḍe 51 . Ī dharmmavanu lalitakīrttibhaṭṭāra
kadēvara Upadēśadiṁda Arirāyagaṁḍaradāvaṇi śrīvīra
bhairarasavoḍeyara kumāra pāṁḍyappavoḍeyaru
sthirarājyaṁ geyyutta yiralū kārakaḷada samasta
halara saṁmata Ā bastiya karttagaḷa saṁmatadiṁda caṁ
drārkkasthāyiyāgi māḍida dharmmakke bhadraṁ bhūyāN .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣa
ṣṭirvvarṣasahāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . maṁgala
mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
